name: Confectioners' Icing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar or salt
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg white and cream of tartar (or salt) together until foamy.
2. Gradually beat in 16 ounces of confectioner's sugar until stiff peaks form.
3. Cover the frosting with a damp towel until ready to use.
